dict.string: Camera access is used in the FKPermissions example to demonstrate camera authorization flow.
Location access is used in the FKPermissions example to demonstrate always authorization flow.
Precise location is used in the FKPermissions example to demonstrate temporary full accuracy authorization.
Location access is used in the FKPermissions example to demonstrate when-in-use authorization flow.
Microphone access is used in the FKPermissions example to demonstrate audio permission requests.
Photo library access is used in the FKPermissions example to demonstrate read authorization flow.
Notification access is used in the FKPermissions example to demonstrate notification authorization requests.
